name: SpecFlow
description: Cucumber-style BDD framework for .NET mapping Gherkin feature files to C# step definitions, integrates with MSTest/xUnit/NUnit runners.

seo.title: SpecFlow — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: SpecFlow: Cucumber-style BDD framework for .NET mapping Gherkin feature files to C# step definitions, integrates with MSTest/xUnit/NUnit runners.

when_to_use: Gherkin BDD for .NET with MSTest/xUnit/NUnit runners
Business-readable feature files for .NET acceptance tests
Living documentation generated from passing scenarios
Step definition reuse across multiple .NET test projects

pros: Works with MSTest, xUnit, and NUnit runners
cons: No further updates or security fixes
review.verdict: Do not start new projects on SpecFlow; migrate to Reqnroll which is a near-drop-in replacement.
review.best_for: Legacy .NET BDD suites awaiting migration to Reqnroll
review.not_for: Any new .NET project, since Reqnroll is the maintained fork
